title: Add the decision item kind
description:
Add `decision` as a markdown-first item kind so decisions authored in issue descriptions become addressable, queryable items. Configure the kind in `[item_kinds]` (its section, id-pattern, marker, and the `per:` link namespace) and index decisions from descriptions via the generic triple-driven parse path the `requirement` kind already uses. The markdown description stays the sole source of truth, with no duplicated structured store. Builds on scoped-id addressing and the six-tuple kind registry.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-01: `jit item list --kind decision` returns decision items parsed from issue descriptions.
- [hard] REQ-02: A `per:<qualified-id>` label resolves to the addressed decision item.
- [hard] REQ-03: The markdown description is the only source for decision items; no parallel structured store duplicates them.
- [hard] REQ-04: The behavior is covered by `cargo test`.
